meta_title: Official Finland Passport Photo Size Maker (36x47 mm) | 2026
meta_description: Create a 100% compliant Finland passport or visa photo online. Exact 36x47 mm (1.42x1.85 in) dimensions, required Monochrome Light Grey background. Fast, private browser-side tool.
h1: Official Finland Passport Photo Size & Requirements Guide
subtitle: Resize, crop, and compile a printable grid matching official Finland biometric passport standards.

tool_workspace.description: Upload your file to align with the built-in Finland dimensions grid. No images are sent to servers; all canvas processing happens locally in JavaScript.

biometric_details.head_size_text: The distance from the bottom of your chin to the top of your hair must occupy approximately 75% of the vertical frame height.
biometric_details.eye_height_text: Your eyes must be centered vertically within the target alignment frame bounds.

how_to.title: How to Make and Print a Finland Passport Photo
how_to.step1_text: The cropping window scales automatically to the exact 36x47 mm regulation size.
how_to.step2_text: Select your source photo. It stays fully secured within browser execution memory.
how_to.step3_text: Scale and move your image until your face matches the translucent head and eye alignment layers.
how_to.step4_text: Download a single optimized image file or a pre-aligned printable template sheet for standard 4x6 inch photo print layouts.

faq.h2: Frequently Asked Questions about Finland Photos
faq.q1: What is the official background color rule for Finland?
faq.a1: The government requires a solid, uniform Monochrome Light Grey backdrop with no shadows, objects, or textures present.
faq.q2: Can I wear glasses or headgear in my Finland document photo?
faq.a2: Glasses must be removed unless strictly medically necessary (no glare, tint, or thick frames). Religious headwear is permitted provided it reveals the entire oval of the face from chin to forehead.
faq.q3: How do I print my generated digital Finland file?
faq.a3: Download our compiled printable sheet option, save it to a thumb drive, and print it at a local digital photo kiosk using high-quality 4x6 photo paper standard settings.

cross_link_footer.title: Related Document Formats
cross_link_footer.text: Need an alternative size? View requirements for Finland Visa dimensions or look up alternative global standard documentation formats.
